basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Junior Research Fellow (GATE) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow (GATE) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/Mtech in CS/IT or related subjects with GATE qualified in CS at least once OR BE/Btech in CS/IT/EC or related subjects with valid GATE score in CS/EC
qualification.details: ME/Mtech in CS/IT or related subjects with GATE qualified in CS at least once OR BE/Btech in CS/IT/EC or related subjects with valid GATE score in CS/EC

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow (GATE) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow (GATE) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Guwahati JRF (GATE) recruitment is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is JRF (GATE).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the JRF (GATE) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the JRF (GATE) post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF (GATE) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 44,910 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF (GATE) post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have ME/Mtech in CS/IT or related subjects with GATE qualified in CS at least once OR BE/Btech in CS/IT/EC or related subjects with a valid GATE score in CS/EC.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF (GATE) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. When is the date of the interview?
faq.answer: The date of the interview is scheduled for 02nd July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIT Guwahati or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contractual.
